title: Write planning compiler skill contract
summary: Define planning-mode instructions for turning validated documentation into atomic roadmap tasks and `planning_build` evidence.

goal.outcome: Planning mode becomes the explicit path for roadmap task shaping and `planning_build` handoff creation.
acceptance: `codewiki-planning` skill frontmatter triggers on validated documentation builds, roadmap alignment, task shaping, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and implementation handoffs.
Instructions state exact actions and tools: `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind=planning`, and artifact status when overlap risk exists.
Instructions enforce self-contained executable task boundaries, reject coordination-only tasks, reject tasks that only close other tasks, and define clear implementation handoff output.
non_goals: Do not implement code changes planned by the tasks.
Do not write feedback/documentation/implementation/validation loop content except route pointers.
verification: Run task-boundary or roadmap smoke coverage.
Inspect against roadmap and compiler specs.

delta.desired: Agents have a focused planning mode for roadmap tasks and planning builds.
delta.current: Planning build exists in source but no dedicated planning loop skill/asset exists.
delta.closure: Planning skill and tests make task shaping and build/gateway timing explicit.
